_comment: The SINGLE club-info record (identity/about/contact/socials). IDENTITY is seed-managed (this file) and NOT admin-editable; only CONTACT (address/email/oib/socials) is admin-editable, and the importer writes contact ONLY on first create (re-imports never clobber admin contact edits). All text is Croatian (hr). Identity facts verified VERBATIM from vsk.hr/o-klubu (re-fetched 2026-06-02): founded 10.10.2014, address R. Boškovića 18, OIB 40419412209, officers, and the Olympic-Charter values statement. valuesBlocks = the charter sentence carved into FC-Barcelona-identity-style named value blocks (the IDEAS + WORDS are from the source; block boundaries are editorial; 'fair play' rendered as the Croatian 'poštena igra' per the club's style rules). historyText/historyPhotos/photoCaptions are intentionally empty here — history now lives in ClubHistoryPeriod; these ClubInfo fields are reserved for reuse on identity/sponsors/contact/footer.

valuesBlocks.body: Bavljenje sportom je ljudsko pravo. Svakom pojedincu mora biti omogućeno bavljenje sportom.
Bavljenje sportom mora biti omogućeno bez diskriminacije bilo koje vrste i u olimpijskom duhu.
Olimpijski duh zahtijeva obostrano razumijevanje u duhu prijateljstva i solidarnosti.
Bavljenje sportom zahtijeva obostrano razumijevanje u duhu poštene igre.

_open: Officer gender-suffixed titles are garbled on vsk.hr itself (e.g. 'predsjednica: Tomislav Mlinarić'); roleKeys + hr labels use the clean reading verified in archery-club-history-source-facts.md. Only ONE Facebook social URL is confirmed (the page id from club-info.example.json); Instagram from the old example was a guessed handle and is OMITTED pending confirmation. Email = the club Gmail (vsk.hr's was redacted on fetch). Instagram @varazdinarchery VERIFIED real 2026-06-02 (display name 'Varaždinski streličarski klub'). socials are CONTACT (admin-owned) → only written on first create; this seeded list is the initial value.
